pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + VR + GA (val_bpb=1.1164, pending 3-seed)

output.summary: Combines XSA across all 11 layers with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, value residuals, gated attention, and int6 sliding evaluation for a non-TTT stack.
techniques: XSA on every layer of the 11L GQA encoder
LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 in the 3× MLPs to keep negative gradients alive
Value residual + gated attention before int6 per-row quantization
